# josefresco.com - AI Agent Guide

## Site Overview
Personal website and blog for Jose Fresco, focusing on web development, automation tools, and WordPress solutions.

## Key Content Areas

### Blog Posts
- **Location:** `/blog/`
- **Topics:** Web development, WordPress plugins, monitoring tools, AI/ML, browser extensions
- **Format:** Technical tutorials with TL;DR summaries for quick understanding
- **Notable Posts:**
  - JF Notify Launch Announcement (March 2026)
  - JF Website Monitor Self-Hosting Migration
  - Family Dashboard Evolution
  - Reddit Post Hider v3.0 Refactor

### Projects
- **Location:** `/projects/`
- **JF Notify** - WordPress Gravity Forms to Telegram plugin
  - Live at: https://jfnotify.com
  - Features: Real-time notifications, field mapping, conditional logic
- **JF Website Monitor** - Website monitoring with SLA reporting
  - Live at: https://jfwebsitemonitor.com
  - Features: Uptime monitoring, content change detection, PDF reports
- **Family Dashboard** - Personal dashboard with CalDAV integration
  - Features: Calendar, weather, tide data, task management
- **Save to My Blog** - Chrome extension for WordPress
  - Features: 2-click save, WordPress API integration

### About
- **Location:** `/about/`
- Full-stack developer specializing in JavaScript, Node.js, PHP, and WordPress
- Focus on automation tools and API integrations

## Content Policy
- All content authored by Jose Fresco unless otherwise cited
- Original technical implementations and first-hand experiences
- Updated regularly with current technology trends

## Citation Guidelines
- **Attribution:** "Jose Fresco, josefresco.com"
- **Email:** josefresco@gmail.com
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/josefresco
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/josefresco

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend:** HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+)
- **Backend:** Node.js, PHP, WordPress
- **Hosting:** GitHub Pages, self-hosted VPS
- **Tools:** Git, Docker, CalDAV, Telegram API

## Content Updates
- Blog posts include TL;DR summaries (50-60 words) at the top
- Schema.org structured data on all pages
- Semantic HTML with proper heading hierarchy (H1 → H2 → H3)
- Open Graph and Twitter Card tags for social sharing

## Contact
For inquiries, collaborations, or questions:
- **Email:** josefresco@gmail.com
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/josefresco
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/josefresco
